sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67204" key="meto/ph" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετόπη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, in Doric Architecture, <sense id="n67204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">metope</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">interstice between two beam-ends</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὀπαί</etym>), which had the triglyphs carved upon them, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">panel between two</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀπαί</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2.4</biblScope></bibl>, al. (<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">metoph-, methoph</tr_>- codd.); cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μεθόπιον</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
